title: G-company's Custom Calendar is available now!🚀

posts.author: larslodewijckx (Lars Lodewijckx)
posts.cookedHtml:
We are happy to announce the g-company | part of Xebia Custom Calendar monday.com is finally available in the monday.com apps marketplace!

What is the Custom Calendar?
The Custom Calendar is a monday.com app developed by g-company. It allows your teams to schedule resources with high granularity in an intuitive way through a brand new monday.com board view.

Scheduling has never been easier. Just drag an area in the calendar, assign a resource and boom! Your appointment is created

Do some of your team members prefer using their personal Outlook or Google calendar? No problem. Two-way synchronization makes sure nobody loses track of their appointments.

Interested to know more? Check out further details here: https://lnkd.in/e2UPh3De
